title: tritaxis glabella var. praetervisa
intro: Tritaxis glabella var. praetervisa is a variety of a flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the mountain sorrel or mountain azalea. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Tritaxis glabella var. praetervisa include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used to make teas or infusions, or they can be made into tinctures or infusions for topical application.
